message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

rectangle "Client" as Client
rectangle "Server" as Server

Client --|> Client
Server --|> Server

Client ..> Server : "Authentication"
Client ..> Server : "Request Delete a file"

Client -> Server : 1 REQUEST (AuthenticationRequest)
Server --> Client : 2.1 ACCEPT-REQUEST (AuthenticationResponse)
Server --> Client : 2.2 REJECT-REQUEST (AuthenticationResponse)

Client -> Server : 3 REQUEST (DeleteFolderRequest)
Server --> Client : 4.1 ACCEPT-REQUEST (DeleteFolderResponse)
Server --> Client : 4.2 REJECT-REQUEST (DeleteFolderResponse)

@enduml
